touches.ai_summary: Owen Hassan from QuartzVentures submitted an inbound request expressing interest in improving forecasting accuracy. Brief form fill indicating they're evaluating alternatives to their current process.

11-minute qualification call with Owen Hassan. Discussed current forecasting challenges at QuartzVentures and how their 441-person EdTech team struggles with pipeline visibility. Owen mentioned they're currently evaluating Clari but open to alternatives.

questions_asked.question: How does your forecasting automation compare to Clari?
questions_asked.answer: We offer unlimited automation across all plans, which helps teams scale without hitting usage caps. Happy to show you specifics in a deeper call.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the forecasting accuracy initiative right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our CFO needs better visibility into sales pipeline. We're missing quarterly targets due to poor forecast data.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with product overview deck and case study from similar EdTech company. Owen responded same day confirming interest and availability for discovery call.

questions_asked.question: Do you have any customers in the EdTech space we could talk to?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we work with several EdTech companies. I'll connect you with a reference during our next call.

touches.ai_summary: 14-minute discovery call with Owen. Walked through current tech stack and pain points. QuartzVentures has 24 sales reps struggling with forecast accuracy. Owen confirmed he's the VP of Sales and has budget authority, though large purchases need COO approval. Mentioned Clari demo scheduled for next week.

questions_asked.question: What's your current forecasting process and where does it break down?
questions_asked.answer: We use spreadsheets and Salesforce reports. Reps are inconsistent with updates, and we have no confidence in our numbers until the last week of quarter.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: Our COO Rachel Cooper will need to sign off on anything over 15K. I'd also want my sales managers and our procurement team to weigh in on implementation.

touches.ai_summary: Email recap of discovery call with technical evaluation agenda. Owen confirmed meeting time and requested we prepare materials showing ROI calculations and implementation timeline.

41-minute technical evaluation with Owen and two sales managers. Deep dive into unlimited automation features, API integrations, and Salesforce sync. Team engaged with detailed questions about data accuracy and reporting capabilities. Owen mentioned Clari's pricing came in higher than expected.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can we get this implemented across 24 seats?
questions_asked.answer: Typical implementation for your size is 2-3 weeks. We'd start with a pilot group of 5 reps, then roll out to the full team.

questions_asked.question: What's your data refresh rate for forecast updates?
questions_asked.answer: Real-time sync with Salesforce. Any opportunity changes reflect in forecasts within 60 seconds.

questions_asked.question: How are you evaluating success metrics for this project?
questions_asked.answer: We need to improve forecast accuracy from current 60% to at least 85% within first quarter of use.

objections: One sales manager expressed concern about rep adoption and change management

touches.ai_summary: 25-minute proposal review call with Owen. Walked through $16,200 ACV pricing for 24 seats with unlimited automation tier. Owen reacted to pricing, mentioned Clari offered lower cost but with usage limits. Discussed discount options if they can close this quarter.

questions_asked.question: Clari came in at around 12K for similar seat count. Can you match that?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation plan typically runs higher than competitors' base tiers, but you won't hit overage charges as you scale. Let me talk to my team about end-of-quarter flexibility.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We need something in place by end of May. Budget is approved for this quarter, so earlier is better.

objections: Price concern compared to Clari quote

touches.ai_summary: 43-minute technical deep dive with Owen and implementation team. Reviewed security requirements, SSO setup, and data migration plan. Team asked detailed questions about historical data import and custom reporting. Owen confirmed they're down to two vendors (us and Clari).

questions_asked.question: Can we import 18 months of historical opportunity data for trend analysis?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we support historical data import going back 2+ years. That will help train the forecasting models for better accuracy.

questions_asked.question: What level of support is included, and what does premium support cost?
questions_asked.answer: Standard plan includes email support with 24-hour SLA. Premium support with dedicated CSM is additional $3K annually.

questions_asked.question: Any other concerns we should address before the exec meeting?
questions_asked.answer: Just pricing. If you can get closer to the Clari number, I think we're in good shape.

touches.ai_summary: 28-minute exec meeting with Rachel Cooper (COO) and Owen Hassan. Presented business case focused on forecast accuracy ROI and CFO visibility improvements. Rachel engaged positively, asked about implementation risk and customer references. Owen advocated strongly for our solution over Clari.

questions_asked.question: What's the risk if implementation doesn't go smoothly during our busy season?
questions_asked.answer: We'd phase the rollout starting with a pilot group, so there's minimal disruption to your full sales team. Implementation team stays engaged through first quarter of use.

questions_asked.question: Can you connect us with an EdTech reference who's seen forecast accuracy improvements?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. I'll introduce you to our contact at BrightPath Learning, similar company size, they improved accuracy from 65% to 88% in first 90 days.

touches.ai_summary: 18-minute negotiation call with Owen. Discussed discount options to bridge gap with Clari pricing. Owen pushed for 40% discount to match competitor, we countered with 36.5% discount bringing ACV to $16,200. Owen needs to review with Rachel and procurement team.

questions_asked.question: If we sign a multi-year deal, can you improve the discount?
questions_asked.answer: We could consider better pricing for a 2-year commitment. What term length works for your budget cycle?

questions_asked.question: Is 36.5% discount enough to move forward this week?
questions_asked.answer: I think so, but I need to run it by Rachel and get procurement sign-off on the contract terms.

objections: Still gap between our discounted price and Clari's offer

touches.ai_summary: 29-minute pricing call with Owen, Carter Lim (Account Manager), and Mason Fischer (Sales Manager) from procurement. Reviewed contract terms, payment schedule, and discount justification. Procurement asked detailed questions about renewal terms, auto-renewal clauses, and price increases. Requested some contract modifications.

questions_asked.question: What's the renewal price increase cap in year two?
questions_asked.answer: Standard contracts allow up to 8% annual increase. We can negotiate a cap for multi-year commitments.

questions_asked.question: Can we remove the auto-renewal clause and make it opt-in?
questions_asked.answer: We can modify to require 60-day notice instead of auto-renewal. Let me check with legal on exact language.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline to finalize contract terms?
questions_asked.answer: We can turn around contract review in 3-5 business days once you send the redlined version.

objections: Concerned about year-two price increase language
next_steps: Revise contract terms per procurement requests

touches.ai_summary: 15-minute final pricing alignment call with Owen. Confirmed contract modifications addressed procurement concerns. Reviewed revised terms: $16,200 ACV (36.5% discount), 24 seats, 60-day cancellation notice instead of auto-renewal, 5% annual increase cap. Owen confirmed he'll push for signatures this week pending final legal review.

questions_asked.question: Can you send the final contract with all modifications incorporated?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, legal approved all changes. I'll send final version today for your review.

next_steps: Target signatures by end of week
